arts.sum: Barcelona were stunned by Osasuna last weekend but the Catalans can leave that behind in their trip to Alaves on Sunday as Joe Champions predicts the outcome in all 10 LaLiga matches this weekend.

arts.ttl: Preview, Squad List, Team News: Real Madrid vs. Valencia; Liga F
arts.sum: Real Madrid face Valencia on Alfredo di Stéfano in matchday 5 of Liga F. The white club has conceded their first goal of the season in Liga F last weekend against UDCA Tenerife after conceding a penalty.

arts.ttl: Antonio Rudiger admits he wants Real Madrid to sign 23-year-old Arsenal star
arts.sum: Antonio Rudiger has admitted he would love to play alongside Arsenal centre-back William Saliba. The Real Madrid defender is enjoying another solid spell at the Santiago Bernabeu. Starting in seven out of eight La Liga matches this season, Rudiger is still one of Carlo Ancelotti’s preferred centre-backs. arts.ttl: Real Madrid defender Rudiger hails ‘silent leader’ at Arsenal
arts.sum: Antonio Rudiger has praised William Saliba and Gabriel Maghalaes and says the Arsenal centre-backs are at the ‘top, top level’. Rudiger was speaking to the Inside Scoop YouTube channel and was asked which centre-backs he believes are the best in world football right now. arts.ttl: 'Amazing': Antonio Rudiger says Arsenal have a 'silent leader' he'd love to sign for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal have improved leaps and bounds under Mikel Arteta over the last couple of seasons and are expected to challenge for major honours in the...

arts.ttl: Wanted: Jude Bellingham at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Tactically, Bellingham isn’t as close to the opposition’s box as he was in the 2023-24 season, largely due to the presence of an offensive powerhouse like Mbappé and the return of Vinicius, who had been sidelined by injury last year. The challenge is that Jude himself set a high standard last season: at this same stage, after seven games, he had already scored six goals and emerged as a surprising contender for the LaLiga Pichichi .

arts.ttl: Antonio Rudiger names best centre-back pair in the world - 'They're doing an amazing job'
arts.sum: Antonio Rudiger is widely considered to be one of European football's top defenders, with the Real Madrid star now revealing who he believes should be held in the same regard
